headline: This S&P 500 Dividend Stock Is Down 70% and It's Now a Once-in-a-Cycle Buy
summary: It takes guts to buy an underperforming stock.

headline: Retail Sales, Jobs Data Trigger Treasury Selloff
summary: A modest selloff has unfolded in the Treasury market this morning due to improved hiring data and retail receipts.  The 2-year yield is at a session high of 3.77%, a 0.05 percentage point jump from the last closing level.  Higher yields on the 2-year note indicate that more investors expect the Federal Reserve to keep interest rates elevated.

headline: ADP National Employment Report Preliminary Estimate for April 4, 2026
summary: For the four weeks ending April 4, 2026, U.S. private employers added an average of 54,750 jobs per week, according to the NER Pulse, a weekly update of the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER).
